title: aconitum bartletii var. formosanum
intro: Aconitum bartletii var. formosanum is a variety of the Aconitum bartletii plant, a type of flowering perennial plant belonging to the Aconitum genus of the Ranunculaceae family. This plant, also known as Chinese monk's hood, contains aconitine, a toxic alkaloid with medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese and Ayurvedic medicine. The medicinal properties of Aconitum bartletii var. formosanum have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, and should be used with caution due to its toxicity.
